label: Body type graphic data
description: A BodyTypeDef-keyed texture path entry. Used by PawnRenderNodeProperties.bodyTypeGraphicPaths and similar fields on FurDef, MutantDef, and CreepJoinerFormKindDef. Child element name is the BodyTypeDef defName; text is the texture path.

bodyType.label: Body type
bodyType.description: BodyTypeDef this graphic entry applies to.

texturePath.label: Texture path
texturePath.description: Texture atlas path used when the pawn has this body type.
